title: Add tests for context extraction solution routing
description: Extract splitLatexIntoExercises from import-latex-ai route to a unit-testable utility, add unit tests covering all LaTeX solution patterns (separate solutions section, inline, none, mismatched, subsection variant), add unit tests for the combined LaTeX block format used between create-context-exercises and the AI import prompt, update vitest.config.mts to include tests/unit/, and run quality gates.
